basic_details.job_title: APSHCL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Andhra Pradesh State Housing Corporation Ananthapuramu (APSHCL)
basic_details.short_information: Andhra Pradesh State Housing Corporation Ananthapuramu (APSHCL) Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been on the official website http://ananthapuramu.ap.gov.in. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the APSHCL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 42 years. Age Relaxation: OC: 42 years, SC: 47 years as on 31.05.2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree with PGDCA / B.Sc., (Comp) / B.Com (Comp) / MCA / B.Tech (CSE)
qualification.details: Qualification: Degree with PGDCA / B.Sc., (Comp) / B.Com (Comp) / MCA / B.Tech (CSE)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for APSHCL Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://ananthapuramu.ap.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the APSHCL Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications is 10th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree with PGDCA / B.Sc., (Comp) / B.Com (Comp) / MCA / B.Tech (CSE) to be eligible for the Data Entry Operator position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying is 42 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC candidates, who can apply up to 47 years as on 31.05.2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Data Entry Operator role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 18,500.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Data Entry Operator post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the APSHCL Data Entry Operator recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve a Technical Exam. Candidates need to perform well in this exam to be considered for the post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the type of job offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job offered is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed period as per the terms and conditions of the corporation.

faq.question: Q9. In which city and state is this recruitment taking place?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the Ananthapuramu city in the state of Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Andhra Pradesh State Housing Corporation Ananthapuramu, which is http://ananthapuramu.ap.gov.in.
